## ✅ Checklist

Please review and check all applicable items:

### Code Quality

- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works

### Git Best Practices

- [ ] I have followed the project's coding style guidelines
- [ ] I have used conventional commit messages
- [ ] I have rebased my branch on the latest main
- [ ] I have squashed commits where appropriate

### CI/CD

- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass locally
- [ ] All CI/CD checks pass
- [ ] No security vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] Dependencies are up to date (if modified)

### Documentation

- [ ] Updated README.md (if applicable)
- [ ] Updated API documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] Updated changelog/release notes (if applicable)
